$comment: Duplication ratchet. The prompt cited an 8.84% baseline, but jscpd (this version) measured by line-percentage on `tests src` with min-lines=5/min-tokens=50 reports 9.09% (2026-06-23 — clones live almost entirely in tests/, not src/scripts|data|selectors). Threshold set to 10 so the red-free build stays green while still capping new duplication just above current debt. LOWER this toward 9 then 8 as duplicated test blocks are extracted into helpers/page objects.
